title: Data-semantics separation and snapshot lineage (owner code-audit P1)
objective: Separate source-record completeness, analysis readiness, rule coverage, geometry validity, and financial readiness into independent dimensions (overall completeness no longer defined from all 108 possible PLUTO columns); separate stable fact_key from immutable observation_id; add canonical response/value digest and snapshot lineage to property facts
business_reason: Owner code-audit directive 2026-07-17 P1: required before persistence and professional reports
inputs: Owner code-audit directive 2026-07-17 P1 items (verbatim in project-control/reports/OWNER-REVIEW-code-audit-task-consolidation.md section 2.3)
services/api builder completeness logic (current overall completeness derived from all 108 possible PLUTO columns - the defect)

packages/contracts property-profile v1.1 schema (edited DIRECTLY in this task; owner sequencing decision 2026-07-17 places this task BEFORE M2-T003 so the schema settles before validation/typegen/contract_version land once against the final shape)

PRD section 12 coverage model + GENERATIVE_DEVELOPMENT_STRATEGY_REQUIREMENTS.md section 3.3 independent status dimensions (legal/geometric/planning/financial/evidence must never collapse into one label)
outputs: Independent dimensions on the profile: source-record completeness, analysis readiness, rule coverage, geometry validity, financial readiness - each with its own enum; dimensions not yet computable are declared not_computed, never inferred; overall completeness no longer derived from all 108 PLUTO columns (feasibility-relevant column set documented with provenance)
Fact identity separation: stable fact_key (survives re-observation) vs immutable observation_id (unique per retrieval)
Canonical response digest + per-value digest and snapshot lineage (observation -> source version -> request) on property facts
Additive contract evolution applied directly to the canonical schema (v1.1 consumers unaffected; the M2-T003 validation/typegen pipeline is built afterward against this settled shape)
allowed_paths: services/api/** (EXCEPT services/api/requirements.txt and services/api/app/main.py - reserved for M0-T015 during Wave 1)

ORCHESTRATOR SCOPE AMENDMENT 2026-07-17 (G1 correction C1 / G3 defect D1): apps/web/src/components/property/__tests__/property-lookup.test.tsx and apps/web/e2e/primary-journey.spec.ts ONLY - the two M2-T001 assertions that hard-coded the retired 108-column completeness value; correction applied by the orchestrator, not the producer, and re-reviewed at the gate delta
forbidden_paths: services/api/requirements.txt and services/api/app/main.py (M0-T015 owns these during Wave 1 - parallel exclusivity)
acceptance_scenarios: S1 completeness basis: the feasibility-relevant column set is explicit, documented with an official data-dictionary reference, and drives source-record completeness; the 108-column denominator is gone
S2 dimension independence: fixture with a complete source record but missing geometry yields complete source-record status AND failed/missing geometry validity simultaneously
S3 identity: re-observing the same fact preserves fact_key and issues a new observation_id; both persist in provenance
S4 digest: deterministic across identical responses; any value change flips the digest; digest recorded per response and per fact
S5 lineage: every fact traces observation -> source version -> request URL/timestamp without gaps
S6 additive evolution: M2-T001 fixtures and journeys remain green against the evolved contract (M2-T002 does not exist yet - it consumes this shape via M2-T003)
S7 G1 re-verification of the documented column set and semantics by data-contract-verifier
risks: Owner-directed sequencing 2026-07-17: this task is FIRST on the data/API critical path (M2-T004 -> M2-T003 -> M2-T002/M1-T009) because it changes the canonical schema, status model, fact/observation identity, and digest lineage that M2-T003 consumes (evidence: builder.py:318-381 data_completeness; property_profile.schema.json:170) - reordering prevents implementing response validation and generated types twice
Schema edits must keep M2-T001 fixtures/journeys green (additive evolution; existing web-e2e job is the regression harness)
Dimension enums are contract surface - wrong granularity now is expensive later; keep enums minimal and extensible

progress_log.message: G3/G4 FAIL on single defect D1 (stale M2-T001 web assertions encoding the retired 108-column value; explicitly NOT contract-breaking/architectural per both reviewers). Orchestrator-authorized scope amendment: corrections C1 (two web assertions -> complete) and C2 (affresfar/mnffar exclusion rationale) applied at 151f2e5; G1 PASS with corrections C1/C2 BLOCKING - both now applied; CI rerunning; delta re-review dispatched to the same G3 reviewer.

Corrections C1/C2 applied and delta re-review returned G3 PASS + G4 PASS (project-control/reports/M2-T004-G3-delta-rereview.md); PR 5 merged at 857bee4 with 12/12 checks green at reviewed head 151f2e5
